coordinates: origin top-left, x right, y down
objective: Observe a highly exothermic displacement reaction from behind a protective screen.
word_equation: iron(III) oxide + aluminium → molten iron + aluminium oxide
guidance: White-hot sparks and molten droplets are contained by the sand-filled can and glass screen.

thermite.apparatus: sealed refractory reaction cup embedded in a corrugated tin can mostly packed with sand
thermite.protective_screen: U-shaped heat-resistant glass shield around the rear and sides
thermite.ignition: magnesium fuse heated remotely by a small blow torch
